StaleMessage:
Sorry to bother you @%s,

but we've detected that this merge request hasn't seen any recent activity. If you need help or want to discuss your approach with developers, you can ping `@%s`. You can also ask on IRC on `#alpine-devel` on OFTC. If this merge request has been reviewed with changes requested, and no further activity occurs, Alpine developers may close it in the future. Otherwise, feel free to (re-)request a review on IRC, or simply wait — the label lets us priorize review accordingly.

Thanks for your contribution.
